BISON_TARGET(FormulaParser "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/formula_parser.y" "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/formula_parser.cpp"
  DEFINES_FILE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/formula_parser.hpp" COMPILE_FLAGS "-Wcounterexamples" VERBOSE)
FLEX_TARGET(FormulaScanner "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/formula_scanner.l" "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/formula_scanner.cpp")

ADD_FLEX_BISON_DEPENDENCY(FormulaScanner FormulaParser)

# Object files containing MITL formula parsing code generated by flex + bison
add_library(mitl2gta_FormulaParsing OBJECT
  "${FLEX_FormulaScanner_OUTPUTS}"
  "${BISON_FormulaParser_OUTPUTS}"
  "${mitl2gta_INCLUDE_DIR}/parsing/declarations.hpp"
)

target_include_directories(mitl2gta_FormulaParsing PUBLIC "${mitl2gta_SOURCE_DIR}/include")
set_target_properties(mitl2gta_FormulaParsing PROPERTIES POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)

target_sources(mitl2gta_LIB 
PRIVATE
  $<TARGET_OBJECTS:mitl2gta_FormulaParsing>
)
